pr.title: Non-Record: Learning Adapters on Random Linear Maps — Selective Freeze, Progressive Freeze, and 7 Architecture Variants (H100 + A40 Validated)

output.summary: Selective freezing of deterministic random gate+up MLP layers lets progressive-freeze training fit larger models within 16MB, with optional low-rank corrections.
techniques: Deterministic frozen gate+up weights regenerated from seeds for zero-artifact capacity
Progressive freeze schedule trains full model then freezes MLP gate+up layers mid-run
Low-rank corrections add small learned parallel terms to frozen MLPs
